recommendations.title: Animal Farm
recommendations.overview: Animals on a farm lead a revolution against the farmers to put their destiny in their own hands. However this revolution eats their own children and they cannot avoid corruption.

recommendations.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox
recommendations.overview: The Fantastic Mr. Fox, bored with his current life, plans a heist against the three local farmers. The farmers, tired of sharing their chickens with the sly fox, seek revenge against him and his family.

recommendations.title: Good Bye, Lenin!
recommendations.overview: Alex Kerner's mother was in a coma while the Berlin wall fell. When she wakes up he must try to keep her from learning what happened (as she was an avid communist supporter) to avoid shocking her which could lead to another heart attack.

recommendations.title: Argo
recommendations.overview: As the Iranian revolution reaches a boiling point, a CIA 'exfiltration' specialist concocts a risky plan to free six Americans who have found shelter at the home of the Canadian ambassador.

recommendations.title: A Royal Affair
recommendations.overview: A young queen falls in love with her physician, and they start a revolution that changes their nation forever.

recommendations.title: All Three of Us
recommendations.overview: An Iranian family survives the shah and the ayatollah and moves to France. This story follows the family through it all. Despite the politics, revolution, prison, beatings, assassinations and suicides this is a comedy.

recommendations.title: Doctor Zhivago
recommendations.overview: The life of a Russian physician and poet who, although married to another, falls in love with a political activist's wife and experiences hardship during World War I and then the October Revolution.

recommendations.title: The Motorcycle Diaries
recommendations.overview: Based on the journals of Che Guevara, leader of the Cuban Revolution. In his memoirs, Guevara recounts adventures he and best friend Alberto Granado had while crossing South America by motorcycle in the early 1950s.

recommendations.title: Winter on Fire: Ukraine's Fight for Freedom
recommendations.overview: Over 93 days in Ukraine, what started as peaceful student demonstrations became a violent revolution and full-fledged civil rights movement.

recommendations.title: Admiral
recommendations.overview: This is a story of a great love facing the greatest drama of the history of Russia. Admiral Kolchak is a true war hero and beloved husband and father. One day he meets Anna, the love of his life and the wife of his best friend. The revolution in his
